full_reference_execution.interpretation: 행 집합·노출 수·optimizer step은 동일하며 FULL은 고정 후보의 실제 순서를 유지한다.

estimand_contract.interpretation: K training-row intervention conditional on common K development selection

stage2_data_intervention.interpretation: Removed K-FNSPID Gold rows are replaced by deterministic PUBLIC_TRAIN refinement controls so every mode executes the same Stage 2 row/update budget.

dapt_verifier_contract: DAPT artifact manifest/training v2의 input·dependency·prepared·pilot·inventory·pack·merged_fp32·validation NLL을 현재 source와 재검증한 경우에만 base-source로 사용한다.
